b) thirty days for any other installment modes (wherever applicable) 
c) thirty days for renewal.

free_look_period.source_quote:
You/the insured shall be allowed a period of thirty days from date of receipt of the Policy document to review the 
terms and conditions of the Policy

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote:
Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall 
be excluded except claims arising due to an accident

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote:
of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be 
excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote:
3. Specific Waiting Period: (Code- Excl02) 
a) Expenses related to the treatment of the following listed conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded 
until the expiry of 12/24 months of continuous coverage

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred up to 60 (Sixty) days prior to Hospitalization

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote:
Post Hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred during a period up to 90(Ninety) days after 
Hospitalization

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (IFFCO Tokio family health insurance covers 380+ day care surgeries)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 8,000+ Network Hospitals ('Why Choose IFFCO-TOKIO' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: The following Co-pay options are available: 10%, 20% or 25% under the product.

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote:
In respect of other than class “A” cities, a limit of 2% (two percent) of the sum insured on per day basis or 
actual, whichever is less;

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: refund proportionate premium for unexpired policy period, if the term of policy upto one year

ayush_coverage.source_quote:
AYUSH hospitalization expenses including pre-hospitalization and post hospitalization expenses upto the limit of 
the Sum Insured of the insured person per policy period.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Hospitalization expenses of person donating an organ during the course of organ transplant subject to the above sub-limits applicable to the insured person and within the sum insured/extended sum insured (if applicable).

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization if medically necessary Upto a maximum aggregate sub-limit of 20% (twenty percent) of the Sum Insured. Note 1: i.

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote:
All medical treatment for the purpose of this insurance will have to be taken in India only and all claims shall be 
payable in Indian currency.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: health check-up: Insured person(s) shall be entitled to undergo a periodic medical checkup upon renewal of the policy. This benefit is dependent on the sum insured of the policy.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote:
Cashless facility 
It means a facility extended by us to Insured person where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by 
insured person(s)

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote:
subject to a maximum of 100% (one hundred percent) of basic sum 
insured of the expiring policy.

geographic_coverage.source_quote:
All medical treatment for the purpose of this insurance will have to be taken in India only and all claims shall be 
payable in Indian currency.

maternity_coverage.source_quote:
8.Maternity Expenses (Code - Excl 18): 
i) 
Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth

room_rent_capping.value: 2% of SI per day or single private AC room; 1.5% / 1.25% per day variants by city tier
room_rent_capping.source_quote: For Normal Room Rent Expenses: - I. In respect of class “A” cities, a limit of 1.50% (one and half of a percent) of the sum insured on per day basis or actual, whichever is less. II.

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote:
The Cumulative Bonus shall accrue at 25% (twenty-five percent) of the basic sum insured for the first claim-free 
renewal
